codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly removes the unsound ExprIf/ExprMatch branch sampling from lib/exhaust.ml so enum propagation now relies only on authoritative sources already available to the exhaustiveness pass. The regression tests in test/test_exhaust.ml cover both sides of the intended behavior: unannotated if/match-produced values no longer get cached from a sampled branch or arm, while annotated cases and pattern-based fallback still reject genuinely non-exhaustive matches. I did not find a correctness issue in the reviewed scope.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 1b82807 diff, compiler-worker skill, and relevant exhaustiveness code/tests. The fix is scoped appropriately, addresses the whole-expression inference bug described by the feature, and adds focused regression coverage without introducing an obvious regression.
